/usr/bin/ar qc libbasisu_encoder.a CMakeFiles/basisu_encoder.dir/encoder/basisu_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/basisu_encoder.dir/encoder/basisu_basis_file.cpp.o CMakeFiles/basisu_encoder.dir/encoder/basisu_comp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/basisu_encoder.dir/encoder/basisu_enc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/basisu_encoder.dir/encoder/basisu_etc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/basisu_encoder.dir/encoder/basisu_frontend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/basisu_encoder.dir/encoder/basisu_gpu_texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/basisu_encoder.dir/encoder/basisu_pvrtc1_4.cpp.o CMakeFiles/basisu_encoder.dir/encoder/basisu_resampler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/basisu_encoder.dir/encoder/basisu_resample_filters.cpp.o CMakeFiles/basisu_encoder.dir/encoder/basisu_ssim.cpp.o CMakeFiles/basisu_encoder.dir/encoder/basisu_uastc_enc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/basisu_encoder.dir/encoder/basisu_bc7enc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/basisu_encoder.dir/encoder/jpgd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/basisu_encoder.dir/encoder/basisu_kernels_sse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/basisu_encoder.dir/encoder/basisu_opencl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/basisu_encoder.dir/encoder/pvpngreader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/basisu_encoder.dir/encoder/basisu_astc_hdr_enc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/basisu_encoder.dir/encoder/3rdparty/android_astc_decomp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/basisu_encoder.dir/encoder/3rdparty/tinyexr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/basisu_encoder.dir/transcoder/basisu_transcoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/basisu_encoder.dir/zstd/zstd.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libbasisu_encoder.a
